    // Read the footer
    uint32_t footer;
    adaptor.read(&footer, sizeof(footer));

    // Return the MessageHeader
    return MessageHeader{message_type, body_length, footer};
}

 11. Code:

        #include <hexi/hexi.h>
        #include <vector>
        #include <cstdint>
        #include <span>

        struct DataResult {
            uint8_t data_type;
            std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
            std::vector<float> float_items;
        };

        DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
            // Create a buffer_adaptor from the input buffer
            hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(const_cast<std::span<const uint8_t>&>(buffer));

            // Peek at the first byte to get the data_type
            uint8_t data_type = static_cast<uint8_t>(adaptor[0]);

            // Check if the buffer has enough data for the header (1 byte for data_type and 4 bytes for item_count)
            if (buffer.size() < 5) {
                return DataResult{0, {}, {}};
            }

            // Read the item_count (uint32_t)
            uint32_t item_count;
            adaptor.read(&item_count);

            // Check if the buffer has enough data for the items
            if (data_type == 0) {
                if (buffer.size() < 5 + item_count * sizeof(uint32_t)) {
                    return DataResult{0, {}, {}};
                }
            } else {
                if (buffer.size() < 5 + item_count * sizeof(float)) {
                    return DataResult{0, {}, {}};
                }
            }

            // Based on data_type, create a vector of appropriate type and read the items
            if (data_type == 0) {
                std::vector<uint32_t> int_items(item_count);
                adaptor.read(int_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(uint32_t));
                return DataResult{data_type, std::move(int_items), {}};
            } else {
                std::vector<float> float_items(item_count);
                adaptor.read(float_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(float));
                return DataResult{data_type, {}, std::move(float_items)};
            }
        }
